Translation.Description: Legendary gladiator Black Spike was said to be invincible in the arena, piling up victories and corpses, slaying champions and monsters alike with tireless and relentless determination. His boots are believed to have crushed many opponents, especially those beneath his contempt who didn't even warrant a second stroke from his weapon.
Translation.Provides: +5 Attack for the first turn of combat
+5 Initiative for the first turn of combat
Collect three Black Spike items to inflict Dismantling Stroke- +400% Crushing Blow Attack
